name: ruflo-agent
description: Agent runtimes for ruflo — local WASM-sandboxed agents (rvagent: 10 wasm_agent_*/wasm_gallery_* MCP tools, built on @ruvector/rvagent-wasm + @ruvector/ruvllm-wasm per ADR-070) plus Anthropic Claude Managed Agents as a cloud backend (managed_agent_* MCP tools per ADR-115). One interface, local-vs-cloud runtimes.
